criteria.text: Inline connect on Reports (no nav tab): no-workbook state shows a paste input + Connect action replacing the stale named-ranges pending copy
Connect then report renders + persists: valid reachable link validated read-only, Reports renders metrics, single shared connection survives backend restart
Edit/replace when connected: a Change workbook affordance lets the user edit the link; saving re-validates and updates
Clear specific errors: a bad input shows what is wrong (not reachable / no access / not an Excel workbook / empty); never echoes the raw URL or token
HIPAA audit + PHI-safe logging intact: resolve/validate/read audit (item refs, no cell values, no raw URL) from MAD-26/27 holds; logs carry references only
